name: Data Product Enrichment Workflow
description: Enrich/transform an upstream data product's event stream into a new data product. Starts from a data-product-trigger connection (reads the upstream data product's bound queue), chains transforms, and emits a consumer data product. Replayable from the upstream's history.
use_cases: Build a staging/derived data product from another data product
Apply dbt-style staging transforms (rename, cast, filter) as a streaming workflow
Compose a data mesh: one data product feeds another via transforms

entity.name: {{WORKFLOW_NAME}}
entity.description: Enrichment workflow triggered by an upstream data product

placeholders.{{TRIGGER_CONNECTION_ID}}: Generated UUID for the data-product-trigger source connection
placeholders.{{SOURCE_DATA_PRODUCT_ID}}: Name or UUID of the upstream data product to read from
placeholders.{{DATA_PRODUCT_SINK_ID}}: Generated UUID for the enriched (consumer) data product output
placeholders.{{OWNER_USER_ID}}: User ID for data product owner and ODPS dataHolder.dataProductOwner
